mapper.select: SELECT * FROM WFM_COLOR_DEF ORDER BY CATEGORY, SHOW_ORDER
SELECT * FROM WFM_COLOR_DEF ORDER BY CATEGORY, SHOW_ORDER
SELECT FLD_VAL FROM SYSDATA s WHERE FLD_NAME = 'EQP_STAT'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO WFM_COLOR_DEF (CATEGORY, ITEM, SHOW_ORDER, COLOR, EXT_FIELD, DEF_COLOR, LAST_USER, LAST_DATETIME) VALUES
( #{colorDef.category , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, #{colorDef.item , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, #{colorDef.showOrder , jdbcType=INTEGER }, #{colorDef.color , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, #{colorDef.extField , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, #{colorDef.defaultColor , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, #{colorDef.lastUser , jdbcType=VARCHAR }, current timestamp )
